Maximize Your Federal Benefits

Exclusive workshop for Ogden & Hill AFB federal employees

📅 Event Details

Date: Thursday, April 9, 2026

Time: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM

Location: Weber State University - Davis Campus

Cost: FREE (Limited Seating)

💡 What You'll Learn

  • ✓ Maximize your FERS pension
  • ✓ Optimize TSP contributions & withdrawals
  • ✓ Navigate FEGLI life insurance decisions
  • ✓ Plan FEHB healthcare in retirement
  • ✓ Coordinate with Social Security

Reserve Your Seat

Join fellow federal employees for this exclusive workshop. Limited to 50 attendees.

Questions? Call (801) 210-5500

Or text "FEDERAL" to (801) 210-5500

Federal Retirement Is More Complex Than You Think

Most federal employees make costly mistakes because they don't understand how all their benefits work together.

❌ FERS Confusion

Many don't know when they can actually retire with full benefits or how to maximize their pension calculations.

💸 TSP Mistakes

Poor contribution strategies and withdrawal timing can cost you tens of thousands in retirement income.

🏥 Healthcare Gaps

FEHB, Medicare, and supplement insurance coordination is critical but poorly understood by most federal retirees.

📊 No Coordination

Without a comprehensive plan, your benefits work against each other instead of maximizing your retirement income.

The Federal Benefits Optimization System

Our proven 5-step framework helps federal employees maximize every benefit for a secure retirement.

1

FERS Analysis

Calculate your optimal retirement date and pension maximization strategies.

2

TSP Optimization

Maximize contributions, minimize taxes, and plan strategic withdrawals.

3

Insurance Planning

Coordinate FEGLI, FEHB, and Medicare for comprehensive coverage.

4

Social Security

Integrate Social Security with federal benefits for maximum income.

5

Tax Strategy

Minimize retirement taxes through strategic benefit coordination.

Trusted by Federal Employees Across Utah & Idaho
